taxonomy: Scolymocephalus laevis is classified as a species within the genus Scolymocephalus and the family Gomphodontosauridae. It belongs to the clade Therapsida, which includes mammal-like reptiles. The Scolymocephalus laevis further falls within the clade Synapsida, a group of therapsids that eventually gave rise to mammals.
